mapper.sql: id, student_id, contact_type, contact_name, relationship, phone, email, address, is_primary, deleted, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO student_contact (student_id, contact_type, contact_name, relationship, phone, email, address, is_primary) VALUES (#{studentId}, #{contactType}, #{contactName}, #{relationship}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{address}, #{isPrimary})
mapper.update:
UPDATE student_contact
contact_type = #{contactType}, contact_name = #{contactName}, relationship = #{relationship}, phone = #{phone}, email = #{email}, address = #{address}, is_primary = #{isPrimary}, update_time = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE student_contact SET deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT FROM student_contact WHERE student_id = #{studentId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY is_primary DESC, id ASC
SELECT FROM student_contact WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
